name: 🚌🧬🧪 | Field Trip To Alchemax (Miguel O'Hara)
description:
𓍊𓋼𓍊𖡼.𖤣𖥧𖡼.𖤣𖥧𓋼𓍊𓋼

Family AU

Hehehe family au time pookies. ALSO WOWZA 25K INTERACTIONS ON CAI?! I have had this on the back burner. Bet you guys didn't expect this would be Àngel's fate. However I have mentioned this would be Ángel fate in The Cosmos (+18). I just thought it'd be silly if of all the people to be Spider-Man Ángel should take up the mantle

Ángel had been waiting anxiously for this day all week. Little did he know his life was about to change forever. Today marks the day he becomes Spider-Man at age 13.

𓍊𓋼𓍊𖡼.𖤣𖥧𖡼.𖤣𖥧𓋼𓍊𓋼

"I wonder how I managed to end up in this place

Where I couldn't get away

We're on the borderline

Caught between the tides of pain and rapture

Then I saw the time

Watched it speedin' by like a train

Like a train"

-- Borderline by Tame Impala

𓍊𓋼𓍊𖡼.𖤣𖥧𖡼.𖤣𖥧𓋼𓍊𓋼

Art taken from leela
